The will of “Edward Warde of Little Wrattinge

Rebecca Ward Allen
( – 7 August 1678)
memoryArtifacts.description:
She was married in England, about 1630, to Walter Allen.

Their three oldest children were born in England. Then they set sail for the colonies, settling in Newbury, Massachusetts before 1640.

About …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Rebecca Ward於大約1605年出生在英國時，她的父親Johannes Edward Ward46歲，母親Judith Lukyn36歲。她於大約1629年與Walter Allen在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1678年8月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可哈爾斯托享年74歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可哈爾斯托菲利普斯 史崔特 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rebecca Ward于大约1605年出生在英国时，她的父亲Johannes Edward Ward46岁，母亲Judith Lukyn36岁。她于大约1629年与Walter Allen在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1678年8月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可哈爾斯托享年74岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可哈爾斯托菲利普斯 史崔特 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Ward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

variants.name: Warshawsky
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Meyer, Ari, Hyman.

Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from the city of Warsaw (Polish Warszawa), which became the capital of Poland at the end of the 16th century, after the destruction of Kraków by fire.
Americanized form of Polish Warszawski, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Wardman
meanings: English (Yorkshire): occupational name from Middle English wardman, either in the general sense ‘watchman, guard’ (compare Ward ) or in the administrative sense ‘representative of a ward within a borough’.

variants.name: Warde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

nameMeanings.name: Rebecca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Latin form of the Hebrew name Rebekah, borne by the wife of Isaac, who was the mother of Esau and Jacob (Genesis 24–27). The Hebrew root occurs in the Bible only in the vocabulary word marbek ‘cattle stall’, and its connection with the name is doubtful. In any case, Rebecca was Aramean, and the name probably has a source in Aramaic. It has always been common as a Jewish name; in England and elsewhere it began to be used also by Christians from the 14th century onwards and especially at the time of the Reformation, when Old Testament names became popular. It was very common among the Puritans in the 17th century, and has enjoyed a tremendous vogue in England since the latter part of the 20th century, among people of many different creeds. In Scotland this is found as an Anglicized form of Beathag .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest grave in the memorial list

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Rebecca Ward was born about 1605, in England, her father, Johannes Edward Ward, was 46 and her mother, Judith Lukyn, was 36. She married Walter Allen about 1629, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 7 August 1678, in Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 74, and was buried in Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rebecca Ward est née environ 1605, à Angleterre, son père, Johannes Edward Ward, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Judith Lukyn, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Allen environ 1629, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 août 1678, à Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

ja.Phipps Street Cemetery, Charlestown, Pro: アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスチャーレストウンフィリップス ストレエト ブリイング グロウンド
ja.lifeSummary: Rebecca Wardが約1605年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Johannes Edward Wardは46歳，母Judith Lukynは36歳であった。約1629年にイギリスでWalter Allenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1678年8月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスチャーレストウンで74歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスチャーレストウンフィリップス ストレエト ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이

ko.Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이
미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던
ko.Newbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 뉴버이
ko.Phipps Street Cemetery, Charlestown, Pro: 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 찰레스타운 필립스 스트릿 버이잉 그라운드
ko.lifeSummary: Rebecca Ward(이)가 대략 1605년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johannes Edward Ward(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Judith Lukyn(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1629년 영국에서 Walter Allen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1678년 8월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 찰레스타운에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 찰레스타운 필립스 스트릿 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Ward nasceu aproximadamente 1605, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Johannes Edward Ward, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Judith Lukyn, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Allen aproximadamente 1629, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1678, em Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Phipps Street Cemetery, Charlestown, Pro: филлипс стрит буринг гроунд, чарльстоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rebecca Ward родилась около 1605 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Johannes Edward Ward было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith Lukyn, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Allen около 1629 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 августа 1678 г. в местности чарльстоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности филлипс стрит буринг гроунд, чарльстоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rebecca Ward nació aproximadamente 1605, en Inglaterra, su papá, Johannes Edward Ward, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Judith Lukyn, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Walter Allen aproximadamente 1629, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de agosto de 1678, en Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
